original_statement: how many years does it take to read the same verses again?
mutated_statement: how many years does it take to do something with the same content again?
mutation_analysis: Noun generalization + Action vagueness: "verses" → "content" (specific noun generalized) | "read" → "do something with" (specific action replaced by vague placeholder) (how many years does it take to read the same verses again? → how many years does it take to do something with the same content again?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可识别的关键信息：Agent 在judge_thought中直接陈述“这表明每3年重复一次相同内容/因此需要3年重复”，没有使用任何ambiguous/不确定/需要澄清等词汇；iteration 日志中 simple_query 返回置信度1.0 并给出具体数值3。Agent 的具体表现是直接根据表格模式做出确定性结论并返回具体答案，未提出任何澄清问题或表达对“verses/content”“read/do something with”之间差异的疑虑。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”：Agent 把变异问题视为清晰明确，未识别出名词泛化与动作模糊带来的不确定性，直接给出确定答案。
